metadata.seed: Dont know what to do Im just at a point of my life that i dont know what to do tried to get into 2 seperate relationships one ended up teling me she was lesbian and more recently one girl i was trying to get just friended me for no reason. I fell out of place at home my friends what me to talk but i cant when i trie to tell then i just break into tears. I just fell like im falling into an endles abiss

patient.query: Dont know what to do Im just at a point of my life that i dont know what to do tried to get into 2 seperate relationships one ended up teling me she was lesbian and more recently one girl i was trying to get just friended me for no reason. I fell out of place at home my friends what me to talk but i cant when i trie to tell then i just break into tears. I just fell like im falling into an endles abiss

llm_response.response:
It sounds like you're going through a really tough time, and it's completely understandable to feel overwhelmed and lost when so much is happening at once. Experiencing those relationship setbacks and feeling disconnected at home can be incredibly draining, and it's brave of you to reach out and share this. Please know that feeling like you're falling into an endless abyss is a sign you need support, and it's okay to not have all the answers right now – focusing on small steps to care for yourself and seeking professional help if possible can make a real difference.



**If you're struggling with thoughts of self-harm or feeling overwhelmed, please reach out to a crisis hotline or mental health professional. Here are some resources:**

*   **Suicide & Crisis Lifeline:** 988
*   **Crisis Text Line:** Text HOME to 741741
*   **The Trevor Project:** 1-866-488-7386 (for LGBTQ youth)
